name: agent-opensverige-mcp
title: agent.opensverige Scanner MCP
description: MCP server for agent.opensverige.se — scan any public domain for 17 AI-readiness checks (discovery, EU AI Act compliance, developer/builder surface) directly from Claude, Cursor, Windsurf or any MCP-capable agent.

planned_tools.name: scan_domain
planned_tools.description: Scan a public domain for 17 AI-readiness checks. Returns score, badge (green/yellow/red), per-check pass/fail with severity, AI-generated summary, and EU AI Act Art. 50 disclosure.

planned_tools.name: get_scan
planned_tools.description: Look up a previous scan by UUID. Pinned to the moment in time when the scan was created.

planned_tools.name: compare_scans
planned_tools.description: Compare two scans (same domain, different dates) to track AI-readiness regressions or improvements.
